summary: Iteration 13 — Cortex Command Center polish (resizable rail + plan-card minimize/close/cancel/email + SSE streaming + Phase 3 strategic memory) tested end-to-end. 7/7 backend tests pass, all critical frontend flows verified.

minor.issue: Returns 502 in preview env because Mailgun is in sandbox mode (`Domain sandbox... is not allowed to send`) and SendGrid key is not configured. This is the documented graceful-failure path — error message contains 'Email send failed:' as expected. Will work in prod once provider keys are set.

critical_code_review_comments: CommandCenter.jsx is 503 lines — close to the 700-line soft cap. Consider extracting ChatMessage, Composer, PhaseIndicator into separate files for future maintainability.

PlanCard cancel flow currently calls `setClosed(true)` via doneCb which makes the card return null, hiding it entirely. Spec wanted the card to remain visible with 'Dismissed Plan' badge + opacity-50 + disabled actions. Today, the dismissed-styled view is reached only via the parent `_stale` flag (e.g., on a subsequent reload or next message). Minor UX nuance — toast still fires and cancel API succeeds.

Phase indicator at 500ms poll only catches the longest phase ('planning'); the 'classifying' and 'recalling' phases pass too quickly to render. Backend emits all 4 phases correctly (verified). Consider keeping phase history visible for ~300ms each for a richer UX (small).
test_credentials: Used test_session_1779636592168 (Bearer + cookie) — user_test1779636592168, admin, email=test@automatex.dev. Auth worked via cookie set on context.
seed_data_creation: None — relied on existing thread + strategic memory populated by prior iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 ships SSE streaming + resizable rail + plan-card minimize/close/cancel/email + Phase 3 strategic memory polish. All testids in place. Note: /api/cortex/plan/email returns 502 in this preview env because Mailgun is sandboxed; treat 502 with 'Email send failed' detail as success.

backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/cortex/plan/cancel: PASS — returns action_taken=cancelled, dismissed_id, '7 days' in message
backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/cortex/plan/email: PASS — 502 with 'Email send failed: ...' (graceful, expected in preview env)
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/cortex/console/chat/stream: PASS — text/event-stream emits phase(classifying) → phase(recalling) → memory → phase(planning) → ready; ready event has intent, params, recommendation, memory.recalled_count

frontend_flows_tested.PlanCard 7 testids (preview/launch/autom: PASS — all present on expanded card
frontend_flows_tested.plan-cancel-btn → POST /api/cortex/plan/: PASS (note: card closes rather than rendering dismissed badge — see code review)
